## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Add any other context, examples, or mockups about the feature request here.
